name: eSim Simulation Bridge
description: One-click simulation bridge between KiCad (8/9) and eSim 2.5 — with automatic SPICE model linking, interactive waveform viewer, FFT, Bode plot, parametric sweep, and 7 analysis types
description_full: eSim Simulation Bridge (eSim-BRIDGE + eSim-SPICE) adds a single toolbar button in the KiCad PCB Editor that automates the entire KiCad-to-eSim simulation workflow. eSim-BRIDGE exports the schematic netlist, converts it to valid SPICE format, runs ngspice directly, and launches eSim with the project ready to simulate. eSim-SPICE scans eSim 2.5's built-in open-source library (1,300+ files) and automatically resolves and injects SPICE models for every active component, eliminating all manual model selection. The plugin supports 7 analysis types (Transient, AC, DC, Operating Point, Noise, Transfer Function, Sensitivity) and includes a full-featured interactive waveform viewer with FFT spectrum, dual-pane Bode plot, cursor readout, parametric sweep, and RMS/peak/frequency measurements. A 6-tab configuration dialog mirrors eSim's own KicadToNgspice window including Source Details, Ngspice Model, Device Modeling, Subcircuits, and Microcontroller tabs. A preflight netlist checker catches floating nodes, missing ground, voltage source conflicts, and DC path violations before simulation. Reduces the 26-step manual workflow to 5 steps in approximately 30 seconds.

author.name: Imran Farhat — FOSSEE Intern, IIT Bombay
